items.title: Mens Later Alligator T Shirt Funny Gator Joke Saying Tee for Guys
items.idea_prompt: Create an original, text-forward T-shirt design around: mens, later, alligator, gator, joke, saying, guys. Use clear fonts and simple iconography. Avoid trademarks.
